assertions.title: Advanced Search Form

steps.action: Navigate to /search and inspect form controls
steps.expected: Keywords input, Category dropdown, submit button, and Search breadcrumb are present
steps.observed: Keywords input, category dropdown, submit button, and breadcrumb were present on /search

steps.action: Compare dropdown options against visible categories in DB
steps.expected: Dropdown includes all visible categories hierarchically
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 19 visible categories while DB had 20 visible categories; g2core_6a598d_grandchild was missing

assertions.issues: Category dropdown omitted visible category g2core_6a598d_grandchild (cat_id=5).

steps.expected: Matching visible articles returned with /article/{uri} links
steps.observed: Results page listed 6 matching g6grid articles with /article/* links

steps.action: Verify returned article visibility in DB
steps.observed: All returned article URIs mapped to article_display='y' in DB

steps.action: Search keyword 'g' with category filter cat_id=15 (g5dupdel_..._repl_parent)
steps.expected: Results limited to selected category tree (self + descendants)

steps.action: Compare filtered results to category tree membership
steps.observed: DB check showed returned article belonged to tree [15,16,17,22] and other keyword matches from other categories were excluded

assertions.title: Search Results Pagination

steps.action: Run broad search keyword 'g' and inspect result set/pagination controls
steps.expected: If matches exceed site_max_search, pagination links appear and page 2 differs
steps.observed: 9 visible results returned and no pagination controls rendered

steps.action: Check configured per-page limit and total matching visible records
steps.expected: Dataset should have > site_max_search results to exercise pagination
steps.observed: site_max_search=20 while visible matching records=9, so pagination path could not be triggered

assertions.issues: Precondition unmet: available visible data does not exceed pagination threshold.

steps.expected: No-results page with message and Search Again link
steps.observed: Navigated to /search/no-results with 'No Results Found' message and 'Search Again' link

steps.action: Record searchlog max ID, then run keyword search 'g6grid'
steps.expected: New searchlog row inserted for executed search
steps.observed: New row searchlog_id=11 inserted after search

steps.expected: Row contains term, current timestamp, client IP, and anonymous user id
steps.observed: Row captured term='g6grid', current timestamp, user_id=0, ip='0.0.0.0'

steps.action: Submit /search form with empty keywords and default category
steps.expected: Redirect to no-results/search page without server error
steps.observed: Navigated to /search/no-results and page rendered cleanly

assertions.title: Search Hash Expiration

steps.action: Inspect search table for hashes older than 1 hour
steps.expected: At least one expired hash available to validate expiration redirect
steps.observed: 0 expired rows found; all search hashes were newer than 1 hour

steps.expected: Current hash should still be accessible

assertions.issues: Precondition unmet: no expired hash fixture available without mutating shared data or waiting >1h.

evidence.network: Client-side redirect for both malformed hash cases to /search/no-results

steps.expected: No script execution and safe rendering
steps.observed: Navigated to /search/no-results, no alert executed, no console/script errors

steps.action: Inspect rendered HTML for payload reflection
steps.expected: Raw script must not render as executable markup
steps.observed: Raw payload was absent from page source (containsRawPayload=false), indicating no executable script injection

frictions.description: agent-browser label locator for 'Keywords' matched both main search form input and sidebar search input.
frictions.resolution: Switched to ref-based interaction (@e9/@e31) after snapshot to target the intended advanced search form.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log did not capture useful /search request details in this run.
frictions.resolution: Used supplemental curl checks and SQLite evidence for status/behavior validation where needed.

blockers.description: Pagination precondition not met: site_max_search=20 while maximum visible matched records in dataset were 9.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran broad keyword search ('g') and verified DB match count; still below pagination threshold.

blockers.description: No expired search hashes available for expiration-path validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried search table for rows older than 1 hour; found 0. Avoided mutating shared DB timestamps.

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 7 passed, 1 failed, 2 blocked. Failure: VAL-SEARCH-001 missing one visible category in advanced-search dropdown. Blocked: VAL-SEARCH-004 (insufficient data for pagination) and VAL-SEARCH-008 (no expired hash fixture).
